glosses.zh-Hans: 紧急情况; 紧急事件
glosses.yue: 緊急情況; 緊急事件
glosses.vi: tình huống khẩn cấp; trường hợp khẩn cấp

sentences.target: Im Notfall rufe ich die Feuerwehr.

translations.de: Im Notfall rufe ich die Feuerwehr.
translations.en: In an emergency, I call the fire department.
translations.es: En una emergencia, llamo a los bomberos.
translations.fr: En cas d'urgence, j'appelle les pompiers.
translations.it: In caso di emergenza, chiamo i vigili del fuoco.
translations.zh-Hans: 紧急情况时，我会给消防队打电话。
translations.yue: 有緊急情況時，我會打畀消防。
translations.ru: В экстренной ситуации я звоню в пожарную службу.
translations.pt: Em caso de emergência, ligo para os bombeiros.
translations.he: במקרה חירום אני מתקשר למכבי האש.
translations.vi: Khi khẩn cấp, tôi gọi cứu hỏa.
translations.ar: في حالة الطوارئ أتصل بفرق الإطفاء.
translations.nl: In een noodgeval bel ik de brandweer.
translations.uk: У разі надзвичайної ситуації я телефоную в пожежну службу.
translations.hi: आपात स्थिति में मैं दमकल को फोन करता हूँ.
translations.pl: W razie nagłego wypadku dzwonię po straż pożarną.
translations.el: Σε περίπτωση έκτακτης ανάγκης, καλώ την πυροσβεστική.
translations.nb: I en nødsituasjon ringer jeg brannvesenet.
translations.id: Dalam keadaan darurat, saya menelepon pemadam kebakaran.
translations.sv: Vid en nödsituation ringer jag brandkåren.
translations.ro: În caz de urgență, sun la pompieri.
translations.da: I en nødsituation ringer jeg til brandvæsenet.
translations.ja: 緊急時は消防に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a prepositional phrase (time/condition) and governs dative.
Head noun of the PP; dative singular (article is contained in 'im').
Main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; denotes the action.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object.
Object noun (accusative), the entity being called.

sentences.target: Wir haben einen Notfall in der Küche.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnoːtˌfal ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə/

translations.de: Wir haben einen Notfall in der Küche.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnoːtˌfal ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə/
translations.en: We have an emergency in the kitchen.
translations.es: Tenemos una emergencia en la cocina.
translations.fr: On a une urgence dans la cuisine.
translations.ru: У нас на кухне чрезвычайная ситуация.
translations.vi: Trong bếp có tình huống khẩn cấp.
translations.nl: We hebben een noodgeval in de keuken.
translations.uk: У нас на кухні надзвичайна ситуація.
translations.nb: Vi har en nødsituasjon på kjøkkenet.
translations.sv: Vi har en nödsituation i köket.
translations.da: Vi har en nødsituation i køkkenet.
translations.ja: キッチンで緊急事態が起きています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present tense; expresses possession/occurrence.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; introduces the direct object.
Direct object noun (accusative) of 'haben'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; governs dative here.
Definite article, dative feminine singular with 'Küche' after 'in'.
Noun head of the PP; location where the emergency occurs.

sentences.target: Es gibt einen Plan für den Notfall.
sentences.reading: /ʔɛs gɪpt ˈaɪ̯nən plaːn fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈnoːtˌfal/

translations.de: Es gibt einen Plan für den Notfall.
translations.ipa: /ʔɛs gɪpt ˈaɪ̯nən plaːn fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈnoːtˌfal/
translations.en: There is a plan for an emergency.
translations.fr: Il y a un plan d'urgence.
translations.ru: Есть план на случай чрезвычайной ситуации.
translations.tr: Acil durumlar için bir plan var.
translations.vi: Có một kế hoạch cho trường hợp khẩn cấp.
translations.uk: Є план на випадок надзвичайної ситуації.
translations.hi: आपात स्थिति के लिए एक योजना है.
translations.ja: 緊急時の計画があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive pronoun in the existential construction.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; with 'es' forms the existential 'es gibt' (= there is/are).
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; introduces the object.
Direct object noun (accusative) of 'gibt'.
Preposition meaning 'for'; governs accusative.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular after 'für'.
Object noun of the preposition 'für'; specifies the purpose.

translations.en: She stays calm in an emergency.
translations.es: Ella mantiene la calma en una emergencia.
translations.fr: Elle reste calme en cas d'urgence.
translations.it: In caso di emergenza, resta calma.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在紧急情况下保持冷静。
translations.yue: 佢喺緊急情況下保持冷靜。
translations.ru: В экстренной ситуации она сохраняет спокойствие.
translations.pt: Em uma emergência, ela mantém a calma.
translations.vi: Trong tình huống khẩn cấp, cô ấy vẫn bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: In een noodgeval blijft ze kalm.
translations.uk: У надзвичайній ситуації вона зберігає спокій.
translations.hi: आपात स्थिति में वह शांत रहती है.
translations.el: Σε περίπτωση έκτακτης ανάγκης παραμένει ψύχραιμη.
translations.nb: I en nødsituasjon holder hun seg rolig.
translations.id: Dalam keadaan darurat, dia tetap tenang.
translations.sv: Vid en nödsituation förblir hon lugn.
translations.ro: În caz de urgență, ea rămâne calmă.
translations.da: I en nødsituation holder hun sig rolig.
translations.ja: 緊急時でも彼女は冷静です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject.
Intransitive main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes state persistence.
Predicative adjective complement describing the subject's state.
Contraction of 'in dem'; introduces an adverbial PP (time/condition), governs dative.
Noun head of the PP; dative singular context via 'im'.
